name: Down Home Barbecue Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine all ingredients.
2. Stir until well mixed.
3. Transfer the mixture to a heat-safe container and place it in the refrigerator for at least 10 minutes to allow flavors to meld together.
4. Once cooled, store the barbecue sauce in the refrigerator for up to one week.
